message:
chore(writing/slack-mattermost): add section anchor IDs, swap entity-encoded quotes/apostrophes for unicode equivalents

Polish pass on components/slack-migration-article.tsx with no
content change.  Two themes:

Section anchor IDs
  Several `<section>` tags had a `data-section="..."` attribute
  but no `id`, so deep links from the table of contents (and from
  the new downloadable guide's "see article §X" cross-references)
  did not navigate to the right place.  Added matching `id="..."`
  attributes on the asymmetric-bet, preservation, and ready-gate
  sections (and a few others further down the file) so the
  in-page anchors actually scroll the section into view.

Quote/apostrophe normalization
  Replaced HTML-entity escapes (`’`, `'`) with their
  literal Unicode characters in body copy, since the article body
  is rendered through React and the entities were being shown
  literally in some snapshot diffs and in copy-paste flows.  Also
  re-quoted a `<Mono>` block containing a single quote
  (`mmctl user list --all --json | jq 'length'`) using a JSX
  expression with a JS string literal so the inner single quotes
  render verbatim instead of being entity-encoded.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

      {"Three distinct failure modes, each with its own remediation:"}

      • No backup found: off-site credentials expired, or the nightly backup has been silently failing. Check latest-backup.json from the last week.
        • -
      • Restore fails mid-stream: dump corrupted or scratch DB Postgres major version older than prod’s. pg_dump is forward-compatible but not backward.
        • +
      • Restore fails mid-stream: dump corrupted or scratch DB Postgres major version older than prod’s. pg_dump is forward-compatible but not backward.
      • Row counts below minimums: backup succeeded but captured an empty or partial DB. Has happened when a failed migration left Mattermost writing to a scratch schema; the backup job dutifully captured the empty one.

      - {"Passing drill: ~45 min of agent-watched runtime per quarter on a small deployment.     {/* ========== THE GENERAL PATTERN ========== */} -
    +

    A pattern, not a migration.
